title: Autumn Forest
description: Adds Autumn forest to minecraft world gen
body:
![Autumn forest datapack banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9fa0e6e5cac291b2fff310dd68177e0e9d0dba63_0.webp)

This datapack adds a Autumn Forest in Overworld world generation.

This biome will appear in the same locations as forest, and birch forest.

Its designed to be a simple and nice variant of birch forest.

NOT COMPATIBLE with other datapack that change worldgen.

![Autumn forest picture](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2277fa4103be72bce07b9624e53ab10d7e80f027.png)
